heroHeadline: CJNG Crisis Day 46 — El Mayo Sentencing T-4, World Cup 63 Days Out, USMCA Tariff Exemption Holds
heroSubtitle: El Mayo Zambada faces mandatory life sentence in Brooklyn on April 13 (T-4 days). O3 leads CJNG 46 days post-Mencho. Mexico's World Cup opens June 11 with 100,000 security personnel deployed. USMCA tariff exemption holds for qualifying goods but faces sunset July 24.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all Mexico-based Watchboard trackers. Data sourced from SEDENA, SESNSP, InSight Crime, OHCHR, and major international outlets.
